spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move custom package imports to the top of the file, separating them from standard library and framework imports.
Replace tab-based indentation with spaces to conform to standard Java coding conventions.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed leading tabs to 4 spaces for all method bodies and annotations.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove trailing whitespace and normalize blank lines between methods.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces after method signatures and adjusted empty lines between methods.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Break long method chains and parameter lists into multiple lines for improved readability.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Split `ServletUriComponentsBuilder` chain and `registerStudentForCourse` parameters across multiple lines.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Reformat the String.format call in toString() to improve readability by placing the format string on a single line.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: return String.format("Course [id=%s, name=%s, description=%s, steps=%s]", id, name, description, steps);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Simplify the equals() method implementation by removing nested if-else blocks and using direct return statements for null checks and equality.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: if (id == null) { return other.id == null; } else return id.equals(other.id);

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Remove unused import for java.util.Arrays as it is replaced by List.of.
Replace @Component with @Service to align with Spring Boot 3 best practices for service classes.
Make the static students list final to enforce immutability of the reference.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl:
-private static List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();
+private static final List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Extract SecureRandom instance to a final field for reuse and cleaner code structure.
Replace Arrays.asList with List.of to use Java 9+ immutable list factory methods.
Rename course variables to camelCase (courseOne, courseTwo) for better readability.
Replace if-null check block with ternary operator for concise null handling.
Remove redundant SecureRandom field declaration from the bottom of the class as it was moved to the top.
Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.0 requirements.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: Changed @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) to @ExtendWith(SpringExtension.class) and updated imports from org.junit to org.junit.jupiter.api.

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.
Replace JUnit 4 SpringRunner with JUnit 5 SpringExtension for test context loading.
Remove deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest annotation.
Add @WithMockUser to handle security context in tests, replacing the removed secure=false flag.
Replace Arrays.asList with List.of for immutable list creation, leveraging Java 9+ features.
Update mock data and expected strings to match the new '10Steps' description format.
Adjust indentation and line breaks to conform to modern code style guidelines.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove the explicit @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation because its functionality is already included in the @SpringBootApplication meta-annotation.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.human_impl: Deleted the @EnableAutoConfiguration(exclude = {...}) block, relying on @SpringBootApplication to handle auto-configuration.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Activate the security configuration class by uncommenting the @Configuration annotation.
Prefix in-memory passwords with {noop} to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ requirement for explicit password encoding strategies.
Correct a typo in the hardcoded course description string from '10 Steps' to '10Steps'.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to reflect package restructuring in Spring Boot 3.
Correct expected JSON string in test to match actual data format (removing space).
Correct test input data to match expected format (removing space).
Add throws JSONException to test method signature to satisfy compiler requirements for JSONAssert.
Add @WithMockUser to provide a default security context for the test, required because Spring Boot 3 enables security by default.
Remove the deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest as it is no longer supported in Spring Boot 3.
Update test data strings to match the application's current data format (removing space in '10Steps').

spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.general_idea: Explicitly set a NoOpPasswordEncoder to satisfy Spring Security 6's requirement for password encoding in in-memory authentication.
